name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Round Rock, TX – ACE Cash Express at North Interstate 35 provides check cashing and payday loans with weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is located at 2541 N Interstate Hwy 35, Suite 300 in Round Rock, TX, operating as a standalone check-cashing service in the north part of the region. The Round Rock location is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and is closed on Sundays. The Interstate 35 location provides convenient access for Round Rock residents and travelers needing quick cash services.

This Round Rock ACE Cash Express location specializes in check cashing, payday loans, and cash advances. Whether you need to cash a personal check, business check, or government check, the staff here can process your request quickly. For questions about rates, fees, or to confirm service availability, call +1 512-248-8313.

When visiting this Round Rock, TX location, bring a valid government-issued ID, as required for all cash services. The store serves individuals and businesses throughout the Round Rock area who need fast access to cash for unexpected expenses or to bridge the gap between paydays.
address: 2541 N Interstate Hwy 35 Ste 300, Round Rock, TX 78664

company_info.headquarters: 2541 N Interstate Hwy 35 Ste 300, Round Rock, TX 78664

pros: Multiple service offerings at single locations including check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and loan products
Online loan options available in addition to physical store locations
Installment loans and title loans offered as alternatives to payday loans
Dedicated customer service phone lines for both general inquiries and online loan operations
Tax preparation services available at select locations
Business services offered, expanding beyond consumer-only focus
Established multi-state operation with store locator functionality
cons: Website navigation issues with 404 errors on specific location pages limiting information access
State-by-state product availability restrictions explicitly noted, with certain loan types unavailable in specific states
No transparent fee or APR information visible on provided website content
Limited details about online loan application process or approval timelines despite offering online loans
Hurricane-related store closures noted without clear reopening timeline
best_for: Consumers needing check cashing services without traditional bank accounts
Individuals requiring rapid access to cash through installment or title loans
Small business owners seeking business financial services and money transfer capabilities
Customers in states where ACE offers products and seeking one-stop alternative financial solutions
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing rapid access to multiple financial services, particularly check cashing and emergency cash loans. The primary caveat is that users must verify product availability in their state, carefully review all fees and APRs before committing, and consider whether their specific financial need can be better served through alternatives like credit unions or non-profit lending programs.
meta_description: Round Rock, TX — ACE Cash Express at 2541 N Interstate 35 Ste 300. Check cashing and payday loans available Mon–Sat.
